Name: M_0_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "25E77C294D8FEA524024039BE0333F9D", "Grandpa\'s farm looks quite large. Let\'s take a look inside the house too.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ED60B5AC44E3637B1CB5108F57EB6DE7", "You\'ve just arrived in the Joivillage after receiving a letter and a key from your grandfather.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2DE6F4BB486DCC033049CE9F0A82D7BB", "Make your way north from the bus stop and find his old house.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E12F3E524EEB8FE41386C0BD0E448A5F", "The house is quiet, with only a single bed inside.")

Name: M_0_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6941E18A4E2CF00A2818D4BC8FDD2D5B", "The house looks like it’s been untouched for a while.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "684309984862D0B693A35386E72DE184", "The house looks like it’s been untouched for a while.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "551804EA4DE341BD0C8C34821617D8C2", "Use the key to unlock the door and explore the inside.")

Name: M_0_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C752E97546120383953763BF6815E4CC", "Just as I was getting settled, someone came knocking at the door.")

CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "72A82E6D49B3302D602F45A4774CB758", "It turns out to be Leon, the village mayor.Introduce yourself and see what he has to say.")

Name: M_0_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "65B09A9E444C195E83C87B9C7A928006", "Mayor Leon suggested you visit Darius, the village gardener.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5D6DD84248765BCD6422168EE143224D", "He might be able to teach you the basics of farming—and sell you your first seeds.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7E544D854AD9BBC865DD16B14A72161B", "Mayor Leon suggested you visit Darius, the village gardener.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B98EFED64D9E49A53BC7A391D36B93E6", "He might be able to teach you the basics of farming—and sell you your first seeds.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "374F0E7A430F100DF3E66BB9D72A6AC6", "The gardener, Darius, gave you basic tools and seeds to start farming. ")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7C878C804871B2E85E9D589D77708244", "He mentioned that he often talked with your grandfather about farming and traded goods with him.")

Name: M_0_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DF79D57E4775D0DAC9B66BA17E8FF887", "Fiona at the town\'s carpentry shop welcomed you to the village and said she has a gift for you.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "66CBAA8142F000E94AF1729934999896", "Fiona, who runs the carpenter\'s workshop, sent you a message.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CA0C29784686F464BDEAB4B3395A5156", "She mentioned she has a special gift to help you with your farm.Why not stop by and say hello?")

Name: M_0_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0CCA8BB3426414CFCD5636AE8FD3C07C", "It seems Fiona has something she’d like to ask of you.")

Name: M_2_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F1DEC4404DFF4FEAC1AA3CB7B3935C97", "A faintly glowing spirit stands by the lake.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EBA829544C8F6DD12AE54194B34B9231", "Speak to her and find out what’s wrong.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1CBE33824CE739A27B2C3CB923A33D80", "The spirit still glows softly under the moonlight.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "947C28224A0E5256A2470AB6BDE5928D", "Talk to her to learn more.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6F9DABDD4846BFA49EDD5AB03C193AB7", "The Moonlight Spirit explains that she used to visit the lake every full moon and return to the moon when it rose again. ")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0B44590749E844B87648E8B48AA0D626", "Recently, the lake’s moonlight energy has faded, leaving her trapped here. She asks for your help.")

Name: M_2_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E19E011949603E19EC34F49DB10BD981", " The Moonlight Spirit says black wolves near the lake are stealing its light, and she asks for your help.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5762B5C94565D1ABCE9343A8DB4DDB63", "Black wolves are stealing the moonlight by the lake. Defeat 10 of them.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8F66BA45427256A5992A05B010546371", "After defeating the wolves, the lake seems to shine a little brighter.")

Name: M_2_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EC34CF1549AA53896F90D7B70983CDD1", "The Moonlight Spirit says the lake is still not fully restored and asks you to find Luna Flowers near the shore.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "44FCE9F94D4A03BC96FC17BF43DE9336", " Luna Flowers are said to absorb the moon’s light when it rises. Gather 10 Luna Flowers.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AFD6CED8449DB03DFD919284B67091EC", "You delivered 10 Luna Flowers to the Moonlight Spirit.")

Name: M_2_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "649CFD6C4C889F0713FA5AB208C7B272", "The Moonlight Spirit says the Luna Flowers cannot be used as they are they must be extracted.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BD171C574FB0BADC55B863823A6C427D", "The Moonlight Spirit repeats that the Luna Flowers must be extracted.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F99BDFE04E3EE5C881C7E28003C8B266", "She asks if there is a herb specialist in the village.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3CB7FC76432C3711C8F43CA5B1743E0B", "Speak to Ivy in the real world about the herbs.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BD171C574FB0BADC55B863823A6C427D", "The Moonlight Spirit repeats that the Luna Flowers must be extracted.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F99BDFE04E3EE5C881C7E28003C8B266", "She asks if there is a herb specialist in the village.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3CB7FC76432C3711C8F43CA5B1743E0B", "Speak to Ivy in the real world about the herbs.")

Name: M_2_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "337A17464018CD210EEB0295CB7769F4", "Ivy is amazed by the Luna Flowers, which she has never seen before.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9AF4B15345858904F6978FA2047C84AB", "Ivy is amazed by the Luna Flowers, which she has never seen before.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1FEC4AFB45F44A8CB34B2B820068067D", "She explains that the extract requires 10 Green Herbs as a base.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "52DE04674397B2A65BDAD587BB687C22", " You gave the Luna Flowers and Green Herbs to Ivy, and she skillfully created the Luna Flower extract.")

Name: M_2_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DD5CC4414890364B7718ADB66B6498FE", "Deliver the Luna Flower extract to the Moonlight Spirit.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D41303F3426C24B91CBEFE8518D7B3B2", "Deliver the Luna Flower extract to the Moonlight Spirit.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5A2372894EA1464AC49DFFB1BB825BF3", "She pours the extract into the lake, making the moonlight glow brighter.")

Name: M_2_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7D7D056C40E7A467DBC1F1B70DC49550", "Moonlight Spirit seems to think more help is needed to cleanse the lake.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4CAEF01E4E4AC5C44E7724B29A06B059", "She says the lake has regained some moonlight but the spirit’s strength is still lacking. ")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D7567B9A486C6582EEA2D4BE52881011", "Perhaps the Ice Spirit from the first story could help.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4CAEF01E4E4AC5C44E7724B29A06B059", "She says the lake has regained some moonlight but the spirit’s strength is still lacking. ")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D7567B9A486C6582EEA2D4BE52881011", "Perhaps the Ice Spirit from the first story could help.")

Name: M_2_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0A9F4696400A8E4A0AA9C3810FF64033", "The Ice Spirit says she has never heard of the Moonlight Spirit, but she can create Spirit’s Energy.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8EBDC18A4ABB0C98B535D7B0EBDE4E44", "The Ice Spirit says she has never heard of the Moonlight Spirit, but she can create Spirit’s Energy.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "90D1FE794E6FBBB27B9D818F29C9B11B", "Her power is dangerously cold.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B65AF4A94E2522BFAB2555BEF6EC464B", "Hunt Winter Wolves and bring 5 “Warmth” items to her.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5A3FCE8F47340B4D521DC1BE7C0A7EC1", "She combines the “Warmth” with her magic and gives you the Spirit’s Energy.")

Name: M_2_12
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C3BAF79E4685145C290832B3E29EF7C5", "Deliver the Spirit’s Energy to the Moonlight Spirit.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "64887ACA4427FF938E107C862B2E270B", "Deliver the Spirit’s Energy to the Moonlight Spirit.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4AE1D01D4AABE4872C7C86B14EB91EEA", "With the Spirit’s Energy, she regains her strength, cleanses the lake, and thanks you.")

Name: M_2_13
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0DCF1EC34B76C9622F5EA88D0C667FE9", "You have completed the story")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D6A330D84C7C1A1F3B594089E0BCC753", "Use the book again to return to Dan in the real world.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0DCF1EC34B76C9622F5EA88D0C667FE9", "You have completed the story")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D6A330D84C7C1A1F3B594089E0BCC753", "Use the book again to return to Dan in the real world.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ECF556634CBFCAAF552E8187FD8B5BD2", "You told Dan about completing the story.")

Name: M_2_14
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D5CB58DF4FC665EB07182A83F9167CF3", "Speak with Sean.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5AAD2F6743DD298A5016338CF71E4926", " Sean congratulates you for completing the story, calling you a promising Novice Storykeeper.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F302C636426E8DAB3599079869CB4B12", "He says more stories will be added in the future and can be continued through the library keyword.")

Name: M_3_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AD8C03354F0FB039E640EB8594D8FE4F", "Zeus, ruler of the heavens, gazes upon you. He immediately senses you are not part of this story.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BD16A35D4CD2B1B4E955CCB19EA26326", "Zeus requests your aid to break the curse of the unending spring.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BBA75B2F48348208A708808D15017865", "The absence of winter begins to reveal the imbalance of the world.")

Name: M_3_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4BD101EE40DEC3FB762E10B06AEF05C9", "Zeus speaks of a strange phenomenon, spring has not ended.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6FF9E6BF48437F18B98BE199DC512736", "Persephone confesses that she is the reason for the eternal season.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5F72B41B4B1A1027B653C2A40AF9F5A9", "Bound by her mother’s will, she cannot return to the underworld, and guilt fills her heart.")

Name: M_3_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B8EA177248DD7B1542192297853D561C", "The earth goddess Demeter trembles with anger.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FE9698C848899C93CA369998C6914CD0", "Her wrath toward Hades causes the land’s fertility to fade.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FD54368C40987A5BEA1FE58F1FE830E8", "She vows never again to let her daughter descend into the underworld.")

Name: M_3_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B7A610834BE75F3D7AEAB89EB433DE12", "Persephone admits she cannot persuade her mother.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3435E66D43847F351E3653B4366B7A3A", "Zeus advises you to hear Hades’s side of the story yourself.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "06B0D58A4F818150AF82C2B458B9269E", "The gate to the underworld opens, and the air turns cold.")

Name: M_3_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "656C783E4C986915E8C22197ED167ADC", "A lone figure rows through the mist along the river of death.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4E6A50584AB22EF03AF418B5296C246D", "The ferryman Charon offers passage for a single gold coin.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C6470C61467BF30EAD7350B37BC18058", "As the coin drops, the boat glides silently into darkness.")

Name: M_3_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B1225B6C4137A07EDBFB199DB967D8B0", "The black palace of Hades looms in the shadows.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "607AE3284FA244D0D56476B7D9F89D0D", "Hades senses your presence and questions your purpose.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5CBBBD2C47073A4D6A1846B707D650CF", "Behind his cold gaze flickers a trace of human regret.")

Name: M_3_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3F8240E741725B50B9502ABEC078C0AF", "Hades seeks a scent worthy of his letter.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "582CBFA842F8573EF98D749C88CD09D4", "Collect the underworld flower to add its fragrance.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "882E373C49E04E809536C5926FB78D3A", "The cold aroma of the bloom fills the still air of the dead.")

Name: M_3_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AA4A346D45E652150A2D2EA8F300BBCB", "Hades searches for a plant unknown even to Demeter.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F2EF33334D842F48B8C17F8B8DD1DB7A", "Gather ten Luna Flowers and present them to him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "07B7F6BE4578BC43634ACD8331E7B643", "Under the pale moonlight, the rare flower quietly blooms.")

Name: M_3_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C0F753394A6A075447895889ACFF9D8E", "Deliver Hades’s letter to Demeter.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D42D26224905E0D4AE66999EA0BA935B", "Demeter refuses, saying he should speak to her directly.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2D7296164E58554066F8209F5BF92B20", "Hades appears from the shadows to apologize; Persephone steps forward to stand beside him.")

Name: M_3_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F83C2CDB4AA3E0C54EEB6B9A671FE6CC", "Reconciliation has come, but balance must still be restored.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "921568C844CBCEA5BE7FBDA667A4298A", "Demeter allows Persephone to spend six months above and six below.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4B8C0A1B45FAA2A8B1B92C845AD34B01", "The cycle of life begins anew.")

Name: M_3_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "204FA8F14D4D7E6762E20C985B894755", "Zeus awaits your return and final report.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5B00FAFC4E68FB9CA314F7A532C22525", "He declares that the world’s balance has been restored.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "29DC833A40DAF71E649315AEB4BA5B4E", "The mark of lightning burns upon your hand -  the gift of a god.")

Name: M_4_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "40B219F546C914FD147784A73FE461A1", "Exit the tunnel and head toward the bus stop.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3F36A3D94A03DDA5FB820A983A10C10C", "ou hear faint movement near the bus stop. Move closer to investigate.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1217404146E26BA6D28D6E85EDB9B3EA", "You find Jade waiting at the bus stop.")

Name: M_4_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2C7EE4F44E01CD38D46288AC8A02611D", "Talk to Jade.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CC1EF53444633C8CE8ADB487EEC9C120", "Speak with Jade.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E342588E4D99235627381A9F31A383AF", "Jade asks if you came through the tunnel. He seems surprised, saying it should have been sealed, and decides he needs to inspect it soon.")

Name: M_4_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4BBCFE5B4295C7D32988CC80BF125E4B", "Follow Jade to the survivor camp.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "04BCD45D43634665589FCE8BDED862EE", "Join the group of survivors.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "46934AE14A9A008B61B7CDA14581621A", "Fiona, Camilla, and Jun have been surviving near the museum, hiding from the zombie hordes.")

Name: M_4_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E602EA0B49D61C2FB806B09B6059812F", "Talk to Fiona.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "07CA77E740182F3E2EEF57A854232719", "Fiona says she wants to expand the safe zone and is gathering 10 pieces of sturdy wood.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E168348B4D20B8420C473096EA6BC15A", "Fiona begins planning the safe-zone expansion with the wood you collected - but she mentions a new problem has arisen.")

Name: M_4_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CBA281A84BCFC78111E664B571AAE893", "Talk to Fiona.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A1CA8D2C4148D8933804E68F68152319", "Fiona says zombies have grown more active nearby and repairs can’t continue unless the horde is cleared. Defeat 10 zombies.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8D7E22984BE3D02EC1C83184A5C6342B", "You eliminated the zombies as Fiona requested. Among them, you thought you saw one that looked like Vincent.")

Name: M_4_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E37C9AA5442831FAAD07E18694E3DD25", "Talk to Fiona.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9E618459476007F38074D8B789E964C4", "Fiona asks if you’ve seen a strange zombie and suggests talking to Syra.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7D0FBBFA441D3EF4B5612EA413D05B51", "She also mentions Syra needs more bandages lately and would appreciate 10 bandages.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "47C9C0DA48FC72A629B1388374310543", "You gave Syra the bandages and told him about the unusual zombie.")

Name: M_4_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "488012E840FF834DA778B0A374E4A59B", "Talk to Syra.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "59E4E8CA401A976BCE007284E70A714B", "Syra believes the special zombie may hold clues to a vaccine.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "980F245C4F2799DBF231A181AB9C35FD", "She asks you to request 10 pieces of leather from Fiona to craft a strong capture device.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9221F7A74426415475D297843EC274A5", "Fiona uses the leather to build a reinforced restraint for capturing the zombie.")

Name: M_4_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5B8A2DC6448F767207A7B9972F76E72F", "Capture the zombie Vincent in the town square.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4F71BCE24ADDDC5E37711C96513A86A4", "Find and restrain zombie Vincent at the center of town.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7EAF934A4CE4CE897943A29BFFEF2E79", "You successfully captured Vincent, whose body showed signs of advanced zombification.")

Name: M_4_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1737E8574B16ADE89FEC82A8CD019AE6", "Talk to Syra")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ADBABD854702972FCFD233A81EB8C81D", "Syra recalls that before disappearing, Ivy once made an extract from a flower called Evening Primrose and recorded that it cured all side effects.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2873CB8F4FA85A6DB0175E8B891C0315", "She asks you to gather 10 Luna Flowers.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E29CA0D640ADA14A7F99099DE4DC9F3D", "You handed Jun the Luna Flowers. Following Ebi’s notes, he created the Luna Flower Extract.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D959D7FB4E5A5548DB097AA60617229D", "Vincent’s body quickly returned to normal - the bulging veins vanished - but his consciousness did not return.")

Name: M_4_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "27CCBFCD483AA1CDF2AC9B8D090CD3D7", "Talk to Camilla.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A85242644FB39FFB1602AF89D4DE949A", "Camilla says she found an entry in an old tome about a flower that blooms in the underworld - the Under Flower.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A0203CA1409625A7041CA5B478825D77", "If you find it, it might guide Vincent’s soul back.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FB5BFEC245FA08887167A8BBFE9FE817", "You gave Vincent the Under Flower Extract.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CE0198DD402ADD4BEF1C41B692457188", "Slowly, his eyes opened. He thanked you weakly, and Jun rejoiced - the vaccine truly worked.")

Name: M_4_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "923C1C8B4C1C7427016C2BB39A8D37C2", "Talk to Syra.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CFB52D4E4F09597DB3063DBDE34B522D", "Deliver the completed vaccine to Jade.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7C2DAD3644F582CFBF1A2587D46AF646", "Jade looks at the vial in awe, hope returning to his tired eyes.")

Name: M_5_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9BBDF57B47CB4E1BC332D0BDDCA309E9", "After entering the book, you see a group gathered in the distance.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CB3427DA4C5CABDA943E60B30FB50BC6", "Approach the group.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3F19457942AFB957F9822FA0B77CB97F", "You find Leon, along with Blake and Jocelyn in tiger form, and Aiden and Halen in bear form.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C8E6EFBB4A08C20236DBD997B1004873", "Leon seems intrigued to see another of his kind and says you carry a mysterious aura.")

Name: M_5_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DA93519C4C0DF1F8931D23A868B649AF", "Talk to Leon.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AD06F57E472F3AE872C95FB293A9FB87", "Speak with Leon.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D9B7104F4A7735695F3F80BF59EF8F75", "Leon explains that the two tribes will soon select their new representative and asks for your help in conducting the trial.")

Name: M_5_2
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6D60ED144C3EFE55E9EDE88A0B186BE5", "Leon asks you to find two trees in the forest that radiate a strange, mystical energy.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9AA6E06344A896117E34B9A105F51267", "You discovered the two mysterious trees and returned.")
FindKeywardTarget: Find two trees in the foreset.

Name: M_5_3
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "68781DCD4558F58C9D229BAC349A736D", "Leon says the first trial will begin and tells you to speak with Halen.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7D111E72464872BB8BB8D78CC1AD3FEC", "The result shows that Halen (Bear Tribe) grew a larger and stronger tree than Jocelyn (Tiger Tribe).")

Name: M_5_4
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "67F91A7A45E6EF82E4F55CBC04890CE5", "Leon explains the second trial is a hunting test and asks you to capture 10 shadow-infused monsters wandering the forest.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BE407A284BAB29E626DFCBB2B47873C4", "You successfully captured the shadow monsters.")

Name: M_5_5
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D9E082AD47DE491F973435BC09D91D3D", "Leon says the next phase of the trial will begin and tells you to speak with Blake.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "490C234E4BDDB74D986EAA9C862DF340", "The result shows Blake (Tiger Tribe) defeated his monsters faster than Aiden (Bear Tribe).")

Name: M_5_6
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CF18EE40484989CB30665EA33B7A89A8", "Leon says the final trial will determine the victor.He asks you to gather 10 Mugwort herbs from the forest and 10 Polluted Garlics from shadow monsters.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "659A8BE949B0B8707ED149BB3DCB3957", "You delivered both the Mugwort and Polluted Garlic to Leon.")

Name: M_5_7
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ACBA79A54DF2A33E27AE0EA98337300E", "Leon infuses the Mugwort and Garlic with strong magical power.")

NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0E1069744EEE509624F945BCC6F67688", "He explains that both contestants will channel magic into the herbs—whoever purifies the darkness first and consumes them will win.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "613188754DE3CAD83663FABB98D3BEC4", "Deliver the items to Blake.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8CF977F2436958B8544C0F88AC705B99", "You delivered the Mugwort and Garlic to Blake.")

Name: M_5_8
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0BA83AE042B4F246C2A3C79A86A3878F", "Deliver the Mugwort and Garlic to Halen and explain the rules of the trial.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3FFF86CB4053EB82F053BD9C52579DBB", "You handed over the items to Halen and told her the trial conditions.")

Name: M_5_9
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ED3EB15E45A2C47DECE15D8BC5807455", "Leon announces the start of the final trial.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "47FC14CE4CA7ACB5EBEF9F92931B35C6", "He says he can already feel their magic clashing in the air.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8F1850EF423DA3A692DBD6B6C4E6C2EF", "The trial has begun.")

Name: M_5_10
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6819D8F541D339F231879B952C8AC256", "Leon reports signs of berserk rage within the Tiger Tribe and asks you to subdue Blake and Jocelyn.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9663DE5B4AB50673F73CD69FBB850EB8", "You defeated the frenzied members of the Tiger Tribe.")

Name: M_5_11
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D9D1FA4F4711FB118968C79C45D843F0", "Leon declares that the Bear Tribe has successfully mastered the purified magic and will serve as the new representative tribe.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7A70A2CE4354423E26DFFA9B22C27693", "The Bear Tribe has won the trials and been chosen as the new leaders.")

Name: M_6_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3A9F6E6748D89C26DA480984F489EB06", "Speak with Sister Emily.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "47A8CDB44B710932D2BD29AF4975249D", "Listen to Emily’s story in detail.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8B5A868F49601C50D6D4AF81E76DFA3B", "Emily introduces her husband - Nick, an incubus.")

NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1EFFFD434B542935834344BE6912569A", "She explains that during the war between humans and demons ten years ago, he saved her life, and they’ve been together peacefully ever since.")

Name: M_6_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "906206A049E734A8A717E394EAA4762F", "Talk to Nick the incubus.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "16B9CB8345040B2A3F542ABA2CF54302", "Listen to Nick’s side of the story.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "93BF3D7B40865F8241005391597A89E6", "Nick says that since Emily saved him during the war, he hasn’t taken a single drop of blood in ten years.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C70B79A3457762AB691B8990B3F314F4", "But now, his magic has completely run dry.")

Name: M_6_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0A7CE77842932558C0C8EA8DAF5312E2", "Talk to Nick.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F3696DBC4FD3AC0F63B97E93D57BF645", "Nick asks you to defeat the monsters wandering the forest and collect their energy to restore his magic.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "83989D3848416FD2FDF7FE888DAD810B", "You returned the gathered magic to Nick - his complexion has slightly improved.")

Name: M_6_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5210DEC3408225BCFD7728B2B3217302", "Speak with the hunter Leymore who appeared at the church.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "844C16814F680A8472292E8328A04C2F", "Leymore says he’s tracking a demon and came to the church in pursuit.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "95F627104D20FBCA1B0579A187B3DB92", "When he realizes a demon is present in the church, he raises his crossbow toward Nick.")

Name: M_6_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6421629A4124C2DB6F633B8459FA627E", "Talk to Vampire Queen Kelly.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A2380F004D7083525274ED89C0ACE46B", "As Leymore pulls the trigger, a surge of immense magic fills the church — Kelly appears.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6848C71D4C8AC4718908619595EE7722", "Talk to Vampire Queen Kelly.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "05BE9A274AE92DB4FA687797A812D915", "Kelly takes Nick and vanishes, clicking her tongue at Leymore as she disappears into shadow.")

Name: M_6_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "632EC0C746230A17778248BF98BB4CA9", "Speak with Leymore about the past.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C759AF224B87EFCEBEAE66A97084674F", "Leymore reveals that Kelly is the very demon he has been hunting.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "71944D874D41A2A6C4979B9DD6A37038", "He explains that ten years ago, demons invaded his home, killing his parents.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D04566364FA84B97334AC59B0DF44667", "As he fled, he caught a glimpse of one of their faces - it was Kelly.")

Name: M_6_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "01CEB9064AFB45CDE4F22CA86C9A584E", "Talk to Emily.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0C539F1044E78D87183559B8857400D6", "Emily says the truth about that day was recorded by the village elders and donated to a library long ago.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AAB19B344F5CD37DC8AFB4BE7398553E", "However, this village has no library, and she doesn’t know which one holds the record.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E36F5D014BA6A89C20CCC4B3B15850A5", "Emily confirms that a book containing the truth was once donated to a library somewhere in the region.")

Name: M_6_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D2ECA78C4560A8CF86B7E4895317B88C", "Speak with Emily.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FB062AFD4FC77D69F10BCFA1A9DD9B77", "Iris discovers the church’s old operation log hidden on a library shelf.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C09B19C944D8EF90FE1020A1C10A4326", "Deliver it to Leymore.")

Name: M_6_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1E5EEE804C2D1C5828DFB2A31A60AC53", "Talk to Leymore.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "90136B074EC25A2133BB4AAB2B05F9DE", "Hand the ancient record to him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9F711F9E4ED9AC2681388A8B6BC8D88B", "The record states that Leymore’s parents had actually wanted peace with the demon clans.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4AE1864143C7BC29A1E7FB9E6199F3BD", "They had planned to sign a trade agreement with Kelly’s family.")

NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "92CF367F45102977A236B5BC15209D0D", "But on the day of the signing, the church’s extremists murdered them - and Kelly, fleeing the scene, accidentally crossed paths with a young Leymore.")

Name: M_6_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A77997C3492A7FA0C91762AA18DEFD45", "Find Kelly.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6B3420514AD9350D317DE6B804733B30", "Speak with Kelly about the truth of that day.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D66A69AD44DFAFC7CEC2AABFAEC27142", "Kelly admits she had recognized Leymore from the beginning.She smiles softly, saying:")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "192A0ADC4E502CD4C2B96887C033E3F8", "\"You were just a child then... and now you’re grown enough to aim a bow.”")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1642367443287435F3BF579ADB9B3418", "She adds that if Leymore’s late parents could see him now, they would be proud")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1D3F6F6A43DDDF3425B1C1912C72D7FF", "and for the first time, her words carry warmth instead of scorn.")

Name: M_6_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2B99799C4701031D9D344BB2475ED0B9", "Talk to Kelly.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0269314349E650E33D589BA26CC77FCB", "Kelly says you came just in time - Nick’s condition is worsening.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DD863DF04804E0343B9195936C004F76", "According to an old record, when an incubus refrains from feeding for too long,")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "31AEDCBC45BF3B04E4A186B6D91B7F21", "his inner magic stagnates and becomes toxic.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3CD166434D85348EA2487F83C27F7CFF", "A purification process must be performed using a special item.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D5C110F043ADC1CAAC44179DC87715AC", "Talk to Leon.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "466A54114797C46E2714E98FB13140A2", "You received the Purified Garlic from Leon.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "72DA9DE7485DB95ED5F0BCA669E3B4AC", "Talk to Kelly again.")

Name: M_6_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1AD399A64C22F923E64146B5E5A5892B", "Talk to Kelly.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ACDCA2B64395D1300ED1368894030F80", "You received the Purified Garlic from Leon.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7A9979094F915F659F91AAA26E284C3C", "Talk to Kelly.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9A07EF5C46EBD3DBB52AFE8F9445CD09", "You received the Purified Garlic from Leon.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1DC9FAB347A2F9D0CB7E04B45384FBF0", "Talk to Kelly.")

Name: M_6_12
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E30725BF4EB2E6862573B8AF140E9E6F", "Bring the Purified Garlic to Kelly..")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BFB5F9DA453322D9230B77AFE38D62DB", "Talk with Emily")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "26FFC8E34D45C2C6EBAC93B4944DE55B", "Kelly feeds it to Nick, and slowly, color returns to his face.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C13D953544A36F4577A88894720CD4DB", "Moments later, Emily rushes in and bursts into tears at the sight.")

NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8BEF1DEF498A4F846F76ED8AF3B955F0", "Watching them, Leymore and Kelly exchange quiet words -agreeing to rebuild the bridge between humans and demons once more.")

Name: M_7_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0F683CB34A6953B1AF9FAAAA886B15B9", "As you enter the book’s world, you see distant figures with wings.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4FFF509142666CEB7E4C74BE7578B9FF", "head toward to Rio")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "80EFAD4C4CB5655E45E44C871475B1A4", "Rio says he’s been lost in thought lately - questioning why darkness must exist at all.")

Name: M_7_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2B2EC77C43AA3AACDF2634BB3513ED8F", "Rio feels his light slowly fading, replaced by a creeping shadow.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2400EF864BDC146574E51FAFC7DBCB49", "He admits he doesn’t feel fear - only confusion.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C351AEAF452AF2D00AE88E833CD96C6F", "“If light is good,” Rio murmured, “then why does this darkness… feel so warm?”The uncertainty in his eyes grows deeper.")

Name: M_7_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A1382325475DC8EFE12F99B03F054B32", "Speak with Angela, who has been watching from nearby.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C4C53EDC496FAB6400D43D9CE0BB96E2", "Angela insists that light is absolute good, yet when faced with Rio’s question - “Then why does darkness exist?” - she has no answer.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CF4DD5144869FBD26A0722A48F3130BD", "The air of Heaven itself begins to twist, trembling as divine balance starts to crumble.")

Name: M_7_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1FE7648E454D808810A533A0C6D2DF02", "Angela vanishes in anger, and in her absence, Bella appears.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CD5EABC14E9A30270F66A085567722D4", "Speak with Bella.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B918D1A6476FEC974A7F5B9C3C707114", "Bella’s calm words seep into Rio’s mind like velvet smoke — and confusion takes deeper root within him.")

Name: M_7_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "85ED7C4649EF5F63312CC69C5B941A4B", "Rio’s thoughts grow darker; curiosity replaces fear.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "91DA2BD34EAE022BE3CD19966DC71765", "Seek out Dan in the library to ask about the nature of darkness.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1ED6AD5047C308982CCC44B57DCB0F41", "Dan smiles faintly and says,“If you truly wish to understand darkness... there is one who knows it better than anyone.")

Name: M_7_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "90C36C334DB603056D67109C9BB59BCE", "Dan says the ruler of the underworld, Hades, commands the power of true darkness.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "104B8EAC43CC52BB8A141F813F52C8B4", "Speak with Hades.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E6ED17B349234C49D404DDA78BD6B2CE", "“Darkness exists because light exists,” Hades said.“Yin and yang, life and death - both sides complete the circle.Light and shadow are never enemies... only reflections.”")

Name: M_7_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0DC089C141D4040925FFBBAF3E57E813", "Speak with Hades again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CEECC9EA430BB498F928ED84EBA1E2E5", "Hades explains that the Under Flower is a paradoxical bloom — born from the depths of darkness, yet pulsing with life.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C50F992C44D5DDEE199889859D90FE6C", "“Take this to Rio,” he said. “Perhaps only such a contradiction can calm his heart.”You deliver the Under Flower to Rio.")

Name: M_7_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "071E8BBB45CF419803DAB1B4DBE91BF8", "You find Rio, but it may already be too late — his wings have turned black.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1FA7920546369BCED0C8F7B7D3128E35", "Speak with Rio.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "76699168474F6046FF6090A194284C15", "As you do, Alex appears - half his wings white, half black - standing between light and shadow.")

Name: M_7_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F9A85A7A4EE580DA7D3061BA21F734F9", "Speak with Alex, who says he can restore balance.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F8E7D6E24A81645C8ECF73B2EA6B845F", "The black flower is ready,” Alex says. “But for harmony, we need its opposite — a white flower.”Bring one Luna Flower to him.")

BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D3C9157D45598A968810B086D1EDFDB3", "Angela: “Light alone was never complete.Without darkness, we could never exist.”")

Name: M_11_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9AAB9F0B4614089A419176BCD98634C8", "Ask Camila, surviving in the zombie world, about the Captain’s hat.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0B9A5E4A4B4663925DF7F080AEA56247", "Camila says she saw a strange zombie wearing an unusual captain’s hat a few days ago.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AA2A2F9C499F99C8F5F7E4B0BDEC6252", "You defeat the zombie and recover the Captain’s hat.")

Name: M_11_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E078759F4D0EF60E927AAE9452E81E6B", "Return to Stella Party’s Casandra with the three story fragments.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E77D69C14FA239B4060B8196FE6145FA", "Casandra gathers the fragments and transforms them into a written Star Fragment. Deliver it to Captain Casandra aboard the Chronos.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A7FF1D1348D428D644BB63815A897592", "The Star Fragment is restored to Captain Casandra.")

Name: M_11_12
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E46173A64727CDF38E0DBEB242F3F9EA", "Speak with Captain Casandra aboard the Chronos.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6D2BD56C4B9F94E0AA23239936A70141", "The Captain admits she was thrilled to step outside her story, but learned the Outside is not safe. She thanks you for bringing her back. Return to Stella Party’s Casandra.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2360E17845FB02D85CE7D0B313940963", "Stella Party’s Casandra reveals she observed Joey in the Void — he was heading toward the Winter Camp.")

Name: M_12_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4F3944404F61AFDCC9B647BA3FEE116E", "Hear about Joey from Casandra.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "355EBD6B47E4187B7A9C6FA79E2D6E02", "Travel to the Winter Camp, the first story.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BA5F47924A7BD5AA2CBD03BFDD2BE71C", "Strangely, a warm season appears where the Winter Camp should be frozen.")

Name: M_12_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EE74B6B945AD1FAF8B82A1A69D7D752D", "Ask Darius about the situation.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "39180A7C49351B4B547969981D532C7D", "Speak with Darius about what has happened.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0A2FAC314B112E74AAA9B09C702B2F07", "Darius says a man wearing unfamiliar clothes introduced himself as Joey and spoke with him a few days ago.")

Name: M_12_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CB9547654858F4720529D38A66195D5A", "Continue speaking with Darius.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3D57E7BC4C1789A8739C73A7FD9F577D", "Ask Darius more about Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0F2C8EB744FFAD22199AABA008416A22", "Darius explains he complained about the cold. Joey seemed thoughtful, said he would “fix it,” then disappeared. At that moment, the snow began to melt.")

Name: M_12_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "57707AC94264C8EA43D10A8BF243D111", "Speak with Ivy.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "84AFE0974304B9293229ECA61B9CDB63", "Ivy says the spirits have grown unstable as winter melts and asks you to check on the Ice Spirit.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "337A80094383D16E5AF2A59987C87ACD", "You agree to investigate the Ice Spirit’s condition.")

Name: M_12_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6D5AF4844CD145D99AFE52AE924ADD02", "Speak with the Ice Spirit.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9208670E4923AB1C0FCC91988D1D6C70", "The Ice Spirit warns that this world must remain a cold winter. If winter disappears, it will fade, and the Fire Spirit will lose control.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0714D7E54B9912A468D9338013D82AD7", "The Ice Spirit asks you to look after the Fire Spirit.")

Name: M_12_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "169D22234E0EE3EDFAB7A59E085F13CD", "Speak with the Fire Spirit.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B0B6B17A44882EC457E619A55003AE52", "The Fire Spirit is overwhelmed with excessive power, lava spreading around it. It asks for help and suggests Ivy may know what to do.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "776598B54D29203D9533DBBD4B64ABC6", "The Fire Spirit continues struggling, awaiting Ivy’s guidance.")

Name: M_12_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "987252C94275E6F387B6E69BA6A308D9", "Speak with Ivy again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "394082E9428CE3BC8D0B07B71171A2C9", "Ivy explains this world’s balance is built upon eternal winter. Summer has shattered that equilibrium. She believes an ancient ritual may restore winter, but she does not know its exact workings. Knowing you are the Storykeeper, she asks you to seek the ancient practitioner and obtain the Circle of Restoration.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7517B3224FBFE42C0EFAEB9636A9C7E3", "Go speak with Leon.")

Name: M_12_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1FD913554E714C258D4849AE5DDB379A", "Speak with Leon.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0A9298404346B0F364044F903BAF7760", "Leon says he knows the ritual. It requires 10 Blue Herbs, 10 Red Herbs, and 10 Green Herbs arranged in harmony before performing the ceremony.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8B1692F64B22CDCA54E860A32603C37E", "Deliver the ritual and materials to Ivy.")

Name: M_12_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "80D38E44443A4B6C109A00A0E3B73E30", "Speak with Ivy.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "427E20874DC47AAFEECDE1880BC072BC", "Ivy says the Fire Spirit’s power must be slightly restrained before the ritual. She asks you to collect 5 Ice Crystals.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "595EBB514B33DEEC3A815EAC8386F65D", "You deliver the Ice Crystals to the Fire Spirit.")

Name: M_12_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5D93CD9642C1B4226DD6798C93EF1CCE", "Speak with Ivy.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "89E9F6584236C4E86ACF0D9D2DA019DF", "Ivy begins performing the ritual, chanting a song about the origin of this world.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EB7E3EF8496F4525F63272B977B6BEBB", "The ritual echoes through the very foundation of the story.")

Name: M_12_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "525EFFF041F8A6133D9A29BD0AED14A8", "Speak with Ivy.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "29DC633149C4D5DA9F739C9062971756", "Ivy says the ritual has succeeded and asks you to check on the Fire Spirit.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E33A7DF943D69AA5DA8CA688BA60E672", "The Fire Spirit now appears calm and at peace.")

Name: M_12_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F4D0C2B14C46FE4E319FA89FC226BFE4", "The Ice Spirit has something to say.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "23CA22054BBFDD7B547EC19218F27550", "The Ice Spirit says that when you previously helped the Moonlight Spirit, it sensed her flow. However, her energy has weakened in recent days and asks you to investigate.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "46C7F91945D72A620BB9F69F1D152405", "After speaking with the Ice Spirit, head to the Moonlight Spirit.")

Name: M_13_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "91BFA9C2476796951BEAA7BA987D223A", "Go speak with Reina.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "406DD1B6496BD3A819CDBFA2C51F164F", "Ask Reina about the condition of the lake.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F821967C4E4E9F2CE30C4881F9379FA0", "Reina says the lake has grown unusually dark lately. A few days ago, she overheard the Dark Witch speaking with someone.")

Name: M_13_1
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B0EEBE3240103B04E5492B86B114A9A0", "Speak with Celine.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E0D5CDD1494953F37A302ABBE300075D", "Celine admits that Joey visited her a few days ago.")

Name: M_13_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "99F1C217468DEC9D9D0626ACAB8DF960", "Speak with Celine again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6F4F96F44F63E655A251958AF82C7791", "Ask Celine about what happened.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8BB6C0A54A01707F96F682AC0C022544", "Celine says Joey taught her the theory of Void magic. She tried using it for the first time, but the darkness became uncontrollable. She wonders if Hades, the god of darkness, might know how to contain it.")

Name: M_13_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6BB4A4FD451AC114F68624B69A20D549", "Visit Hades.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "147139384153225B20337295EC5E7F5E", "Hades explains that to control overwhelming darkness, a vessel is required. He asks you to gather 1 Fox Orb, 10 Dark Flowers, and 10 Luna Flowers.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AEE7AD284B2E59F4586415962DEBD4B4", "Hades infuses the energy of Luna Flowers and Underworld Flowers into the Fox Orb, creating a vessel capable of containing the power of darkness.")

Name: M_13_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B02BBB224FF3D2E0AF2C9A8734DB9D78", "Deliver the vessel to Celine.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7BD225C14FF2BBA92D00D385D5CE918A", "Give Celine the vessel that can contain the darkness.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "149D81B24C469FF1AD45A7AC39EC88DD", "Using the orb as a medium, Celine casts Void magic. The darkness covering the Luna Flowers slowly begins to fade.")

Name: M_13_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9A698D26434A81A0613D73B981609714", "Ask Celine about Joey’s whereabouts.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6472BAC54E382B54E15E809642EE7B4C", "Continue speaking with Celine about Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "831EAB9B41033FBB3A733DBABA9F6A91", "Celine says Joey saw and heard many things while in the Void. There, he learned how to wield its power.")

Name: M_13_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "20D7C6404773014320DC0CB62D447227", "Celine asks for your help.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "48CC7E354DF62ABBC77787928D9567C7", "Celine hopes to enter the Void herself. The dimensional gate and magic circle are prepared, but she lacks materials. Bring her one bottle of Stella Essence. (Obtainable through the “Star Essence” skill or by trading 1 Milk and 1 Diamond with Hera at the temple.)")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3E35FD9842B6DA911615A68644B79E39", "Celine steps through the dimensional gate into the Void.")

Name: M_13_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "04E54AF04A4241800C02EFAF2E5684E0", "After Celine crosses into the Void, the sun suddenly rises over Luna Lake. Go into the Void and speak with her.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B1ED5D734F4DCE69E06279B748109728", "Speak with Void-Celine.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "477026984A53F59D8DC318BC1D4154F5", "Celine realizes that once she left her story, the narrative she belonged to began collapsing. She understands that her existence is necessary for it to continue.")

Name: M_13_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3BA4C6554D8851B01E177AA74FC06BCB", "Speak with Void-Celine.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A4F1CF174E6849412E1DBC873F3E2471", "Celine explains that Luna Lake requires her presence for the moon to rise, yet she wishes to remain in the Void to study magic. She discovers a cloning spell that allows her to divide her memories, leaving a version behind at the lake. Collect 10 Ice Crystals.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9E399067426C6DC6200B1286CEAF3537", "Celine prepares to divide her memories and create a copy to remain in Luna Lake.")

Name: M_13_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E848215B47187497E515C3AAA332D09F", "Speak with Void-Celine.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "01F9463D43DF7D74400970A2CC1EA3F1", "Continue speaking with Void-Celine.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A6FF8C70443110A66C49C7823244F09B", "Celine decides to create a duplicate of herself — one without the memories of the Void and the knowledge she gained there.")

Name: M_13_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7C05312B4DA27DFFAD0CC6A641BEE830", "Speak with Celine at Luna Lake.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3211BB104BF80237520D85B4827BCB34", "Lake-Celine has no memory of the Void. She gazes at the sky and whispers that the moon shines brighter because she is here.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EE6FA98B4EFD35CA80858DA17ECC1C79", "Lake-Celine remains unaware of the Void, peacefully continuing her role within the story.")

Name: M_13_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "12EDD7334D07BFE448AC65809272A55F", "Speak with Celine at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E16EC8BA44D29910B7C14E9AAEF46A13", "Stella Party’s Celine senses that her story has split into two paths.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AFE2E0BF44E07DC1497B2A90A7179B0E", "She confirms that one of her narratives has branched. As the conversation ends, Nick from Stella Party approaches.")

Name: M_14_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7EEF7D9246BF5DCF51C8D2AEA599CAB4", "Nick at Stella Party wishes to speak.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "885585AF47710C113399348C436147C0", "Talk with Nick at Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CFB489344B61AE4C58BA46916E17468D", "Stella Party’s Nick says that the storyline of his demonic counterpart feels faint and unstable.")

Name: M_14_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7ECF367342E13D65D2C3BF8EE195F549", "Speak with Vampire Nick at the church.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "773207A4463D9CB0BBB1EA8F6E81D9AA", "Vampire Nick no longer appears demonic.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F0B90AD64B1053D3615429BE51E31490", "He says Joey visited him a few days ago and they had a long conversation.")

Name: M_14_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AC7431534E46CCB6C806CFB1A871EA49", "Speak again with Nick at the church.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9219B524470C405DA87302949097560A", "Nick explains Joey asked him what his deepest wish was. He answered that he wanted to become human. Joey handed him a piece of paper and said that tearing it would grant that wish.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F0678FBA457AA22DCC5124927F5325EF", "Nick tore the paper without hesitation. The next morning, he had become human.")

Name: M_14_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0A46D6B24E76F5DFFC7C33A9B9A15F69", "Speak with Nick at the church.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B30AB63947557C14A19326BC17DA319D", "Human Nick says he keeps dreaming of a place that is not here. He feels uncertain whether those memories are truly his or merely dreams.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CDBC7C324BF8F5B167F2F78B3F1A8A99", "Go speak with Nick in Joiville.")

Name: M_14_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5DF7A0184EAB0978594C04A9825CC6DD", "Speak with Nick in Joiville.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "38F3948F4E691AD577FE95B0BE0E7EAE", "Joiville’s Nick says he has been having strange dreams — standing in a church much like his own, speaking with Emily dressed as a nun. When he wakes, he feels unsure whether the dream was reality or the reality was the dream.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F36D2EE84F17A3EAC1BC6CABF7C13F3D", "Return to the church’s Nick.")

Name: M_14_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "31CF28D84C8066251099FCACFE832750", "Return to Nick at the church.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1802FAB045898A85E8441D95C564F412", "Church Nick appears to be asleep. When shaken awake, he looks confused and asks where he is — it is Joiville’s Nick who has awakened in this body.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C998FF6144B0A23A5EE9FEB835D7BBEF", "The identities seem to be crossing.")

Name: M_14_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A9F3111044F91770D4403EB405C485E9", "Check on Nick at the church between 10 PM and 8 AM.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A1F8BFD4426DD74C644BE88768EBC726", "Church Nick awakens as Joiville’s Nick. He marvels at how vivid the “dream” feels and asks you to help him wake from it.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "890D83764933B13B2E54E190149EC9BD", "Seek help from Nick at Stella Party.")

Name: M_14_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "83F194ED4F748A93BC9F5696D7C944FA", "Ask Stella Party’s Nick for help.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D746AD56429992CCDF48239BC1F8E645", "He explains the two Nicks share the same soul. The only thing separating them was their narrative concept. Now that those concepts overlap, confusion occurs.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7BC8EBCC496535FFB425CCBA649B7DE3", "He concludes that Church Nick must return to being a vampire.")

Name: M_14_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "236935994D6F9EF70C2EBB97E8E6E724", "Visit Church Nick between 8 AM and 10 PM.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "760C1D7540782A055D1C96A341141516", "Church Nick seems restored to himself. You explain that to resolve the instability, he must become a vampire again — remaining human will eventually destroy both souls.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B634A60A4B38E8C6033FF8BFFF3AB534", "Nick says he made the choice to be human to stay with Emily. If he dies as a human, it would be meaningless. He believes Kelly may be able to help him return.")

Name: M_14_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6A277B1140A36E7FFD839EB04904BCF0", "Speak with Kelly, the Vampire Queen.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "043AAA0C42137B94C79CB3B8EE7A15A6", "Kelly already senses Nick’s condition. She asks if he is certain about returning to his demonic nature. Nick confirms. Kelly gives him an essence containing vampiric power. His wings and fangs begin to reappear.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DCB0C5D549643C90DA3084A2C0830D73", "Nick returns as a vampire, appearing more alive than ever. Kelly smiles and says he has finally learned how to survive.")

Name: M_14_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3F1419C44CAAB7286151AFA5069E352D", "Speak with Church Nick.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "245A78CA4D0929E81D3FB98D107CCB41", "Nick explains that as a vampire, he once survived only on magic and blood. But during his time as a human, he learned to eat food — and now he can restore magic through meals.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FDA4D66A41E3EC5BA9B155BBBC9FB912", "Vampire Nick has learned to recover magic through food.")

Name: M_14_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "51875DD2482BE77B4C9E54863A7DE6F6", "Speak with Emily at the church.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C270C2A340373B64DCAC1FAD0F8D9E3B", "Emily is grateful that Nick can now live beside her without fear. She wishes to prepare a feast. Provide 10 Meat and 10 Bottles of Wine.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "06EADB584980BE56944EC6A77C597305", "Emily says none of this would have been possible without Kelly and wishes to invite her to the feast.")

Name: M_14_12
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A6CCBB98444165B0544BAC92921B0A9C", "Speak with Kelly, the Vampire Queen.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A878CAD243052625BF9F83B1D86AA87B", "Kelly is surprised by the invitation but attends. Everyone gathers to share the meal. Seeing Nick happily eating, Kelly smiles warmly. Raymor shyly thanks Kelly for coming and offers her food. Kelly, moved, raises her glass for a toast.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1DF045A94DB816A4CC4A1B9D2C541D49", "The feast strengthens bonds between them all.")

Name: M_14_13
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1113E5EC4BE52586CC7598A9B1683958", "Speak with Nick at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "176D1D1C4ACFF9E0F3A52880C316DEFA", "Talk with Stella Party’s Nick.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B166DEAD489945944DFCF18D7A299D69", "Stella Party’s Nick says his story feels brighter and more stable than before. At that moment, your phone begins to vibrate.")

Name: M_15_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1DB4C0114268F5857FC8FC8F9BBCBD94", "Check the message on your phone.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EA672D5F4EB1CD86E674AB8343BE9CA8", "A message has arrived from Syra in the Zombie World.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5E89181E47756AAC6AA39AA07CE65EE0", "You read the message.")

Name: M_15_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C281958A4FB41367F69EC291FC78DEA9", "Go speak with Syra.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9BF43D5045710E5F6B15F58EE91B9C9D", "Syra says Joey visited her a few days ago. He asked if she needed anything. She told him she had learned through Lilis that other worlds exist and that she was searching for a way to contact them. Joey gave her the Celestial Compass, and through it, she claims she can communicate with constellations of other worlds.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8BBC9FD84814D851C5BA3DA7AEFE2D1C", "As she speaks, Syra seems unstable, as if something is overwhelming her.")

Name: M_15_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5B3D88F4435362D8E44DD69F07C1EB23", "Continue speaking with Syra.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "62EADC8847F76F51BF7D7EB9432F93DD", "Syra admits that after obtaining the Celestial Compass, she became obsessed with peering into other worlds. She has learned too many truths, and the flood of information is crushing her.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A805F4E64E84A986F5B7899F72ACEC96", "She struggles under the weight of knowledge.")

Name: M_15_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3590881745A6C235A3FE31B09C439E2B", "Speak with Syra again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D59CAC4A42FAB466400F588C2C2D25DE", "Syra says she cannot endure this information and plans to transfer it into her phone. After glimpsing both ancient rituals and modern science, she has drafted a blueprint based on immense knowledge — but it requires precise engineering. She has been waiting for Joey, yet he never returned after giving her the relic.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9D2CFEA34E409EB13E6B48B4EFDA03EE", "Take the blueprint to Joey in Joiville.")

Name: M_15_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4A20A9FF4553E5A3D4FBB0A360F1B32E", "Speak with Joey in Joiville.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "423131C84F1A2468137E9B83E7EEBA6F", "Ask Joey to examine the blueprint.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DE02146644B968B00BE681B4CE9DED8C", "Joey says he has never seen circuitry like this before — but somehow, he understands what to do. He constructs a special device.")

Name: M_15_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7E713FCE40A7F8F0723B98962F1A016D", "Speak with Joey in Joiville.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E4FB196140F7CEA70F6A8BB54B239F3C", "Joey explains that according to the design, the machine appears to extract the user’s memories. However, the blueprint requires something called “story,” and without it, the device cannot function here.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4DF6C587443206200694688661B714E9", "The device is completed but cannot activate in this world.")

Name: M_15_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1ECEA7014F0E9EBBC2E3B582C2D1A117", "Return to Syra in the Zombie World.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AAD24C434B0117C2BBD1E5BB33201ECE", "Syra activates the machine. Words begin swirling around her, drawn into the device.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7426F0904DBE3EE8720647A974E84844", "The machine finishes operating, but Syra collapses and fails to regain consciousness.")

Name: M_15_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8A13DF2744638CD2328C0AA9BB3D5E7B", "Words still drift around her unconscious body.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "18D286C84E89C54F14EFE780D5CCE945", "Speak with Syra at Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0D9DBBC846F1BABF7CE403BE0F76554D", "Stella Party’s Syra says part of her story has been torn away, and her avatar is now in danger. Yet she continues to record and observe her counterpart, protecting her. She hands you a Star Fragment from her dress.")

Name: M_15_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DB254B2548524FD5A25238BA81B68D57", "Give the Star Fragment to Syra in the Zombie World.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B05A468F44988AC2FB10968C59F9B851", "Deliver the fragment.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "30F516904339E8222ACB35921C22638B", "Syra regains consciousness. Her overwhelming memories appear gone. However, the information transmitted by the device glows brightly within her phone.")

Name: M_15_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "882F9143411705DAB288A7AC8CEA2E4E", "Speak with Syra in the Zombie World.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8A0F7A2E48C4A0259700F0B163A49DF3", "Speak with Syra in the Zombie World.")
NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D900B3BB4A07B2BB521C69A84B4F2CDB", "Syra begins analyzing the data stored in her phone.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C94E30FF49D19E8746F700A9ED66525A", "She searches through the information, tracking clues about the vaccine’s whereabouts.")

Name: M_15_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D7DF2D1A411889617C47AF94E8E66941", "Speak with Syra again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1C2AD7594EF945C9D881E887C32E385B", "Continue speaking with her.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2A6494514C7F601D06CB3CB33493D592", "Syra discovers a devastating truth — there is no vaccine.")

Name: M_15_11
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E261B9BD4D23254C3F4DA2987FF8E629", "Speak with Syra in the Zombie World.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BDEAF56C42213AC2C906E2B6C818711B", "Continue speaking with her.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E929486B4386B1F35A2322A8FE78678C", "Though there is no vaccine, Syra says there may still be a treatment. Her expression regains hope.")

Name: M_15_12
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4855F1AE4D9DC2B5E849CFA6F254B058", "Speak with Syra at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2EC410D34B3113C05D51FFA38DDF384F", "Continue speaking with Stella Party’s Syra.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DE2FB7AC40F015CB919570810221624C", "She explains that some stories are unavoidable. Her narrative is built upon a zombie world setting — a world where a vaccine does not exist. “A world with treatment but no cure… a contradiction. But isn’t that exactly what makes it a story?”")

Name: M_16_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9D143D1D4371636E6DC106824E8B45F9", "Joey at Stella Party wishes to speak.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5C5BB677455398873B68B6A376DE5A29", "Stella Party’s Joey says Leon has reported seeing Joey within his story.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BFD8D3094FBCF45E3C3BA3BF098BDFE7", "Travel to the Animal Forest.")

Name: M_16_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "44159BEC448D6CE21A4124992600D88B", "Find Leon in the Animal Forest.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "95AFA0CF4975BDBBC4390CB5311AB725", "Approach Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "521DB5714A4C2C87ECF2D2BC522F2B5A", "You finally locate Joey. Speak with him.")

Name: M_16_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "73A678D2407FA23EE84FDDAD87277187", "Speak with Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "09269A8846AF3B338C669CBFE03FD963", "Continue your conversation with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8814DD394D8336D821EC0BB68CFBAD23", "Joey explains what he experienced in the Void. He says he no longer wishes to belong to a story. Instead, he wants to become a Recorder — to write his own story.")

Name: M_16_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6EE9CE1B4CD58183BF46AE9B98077D95", "Speak with Leon.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "653A1079453A09539984FFA734404A61", "Continue your discussion with Leon.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AF07BCFC462DAEDD358348B1103FAE17", "Leon reveals that his story is one of the primordial narratives. He has long been aware of the Void’s existence.")

Name: M_16_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D401F4D1469A3A94A4017582E3BCFF08", "Speak with Leon again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "194A41324F03B6526424779136A11424", "Continue speaking with Leon.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B30B5F7946CE8DCF792660968BFEABDE", "Leon explains why he never crossed into the Void. If he disappears, his story ceases to exist — and that would mean the collapse of this world. Other characters might simply move to another story, but Leon’s is one of the primal foundations. Without it, later stories cannot exist. Thus, primordial beings carry the responsibility of sustaining their narrative. Leon suggests seeking Hades, another protagonist of a primordial story, who may offer guidance.")

Name: M_16_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5E22DFAE474410D5F7A4929BC3233E93", "Go speak with Hades.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "75331BBA426880BCAA4F01A6BE1EA850", "Continue speaking with Hades.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ACBA73B145CAA504A6F53FBE037EEB69", "Hades explains that stories exist because of protagonists, but protagonists also exist because of stories. Just as gods exist because humans believe in them, divinity itself is a construct born of narrative.")

Name: M_16_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "10BE460B46A33745A3A1E0A1BB7A6D68", "Speak with Hades again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8D11463848610DF68B9091829B2991B1", "Continue speaking with Hades.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "290F243D4FC94C5C82A508B21B5EA12F", "Hades says that with divinity, one can experience the gaze of the observer. Yet becoming an observer also brings the faint awareness that one is being observed by another.")

Name: M_16_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E51E9A7E4B313ED86B1534AE97F59363", "Speak with Hades once more.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "80F71603489497B1D839FCAA04146242", "Continue the discussion with Hades.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A174ADBC4B233D3781E0CA9BB9750FE1", "Hades tells Joey that if he truly wishes to obtain authentic divinity, he must meet his own observer.")

Name: M_17_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "49B4DA774840F352B80247A624192C12", "Joey wishes to speak with his true self.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DA26E7704EEEEE9A6C70EB8CBD3A945E", "Speak with Joey at Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "909B98414769B4895D324E9CA60B3CA8", "Stella Party’s Joey says he cannot leave his position recklessly. There must be narrative plausibility — a proper reason for such a meeting.")

Name: M_17_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AB17CBBC4A6C4A7D5E861AB323359317", "Continue speaking with Joey at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "781A791C4E0CE55B1BB46DB9D7BA7B55", "Ask Joey how two worlds may be connected.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A01D23A348722A8332FFFAABEF599268", "He explains that a medium linking the two worlds is required. He asks you to find a story related to such a bridge.")

Name: M_17_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "530DAD2D43EE634F94F2D9AC08875EAE", "Speak with Iris at the library.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "032D99254C500147DD06F385356FDC72", "Ask Iris about stories that connect two worlds.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BF89DF404A7ECCE824F6C6B546E7D1B3", "Iris tells you about the legend of the Ojakgyo — the bridge formed by magpies.")

Name: M_17_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5C490CFB4D73ADFC4C1302B4002798FC", "Inform Joey in the Void about the Ojakgyo.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E17D458943EFB479237E098B9CADCEED", "Void-Joey says the ritual requires two kinds of feathers. Seek Rio for assistance.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4B6565AF4343C229A028028EF3DDBED7", "Go speak with Rio.")

Name: M_17_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E54DA22B47D26ED920305389624F8E3F", "Speak with Rio.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7AA5FD584C034819FD7911B17FF83D8A", "Grateful for your past help, Rio lends you one white feather and one black feather.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F3CCDE6E4E008BFFBF2D1AA2A0B6803C", "Return to Joey in the Void. He says the materials are ready, but Celine’s duplication magic is required.")

Name: M_17_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2BB10DDB44E1B27ECE3542BFE3CA711A", "Ask Celine for help.")
