ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "148AC1CD4371E98B548F668F46392B7A", "Celine casts a spell upon the two feathers. Bring the enchanted feathers back to the Void.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E045A977452C53E5E6E1F0BFBAB68BAC", "With Celine’s power, a Crow Spirit is created. Return to Joey in the Void.")

Name: M_17_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "73B6E58C42DD273E812722A1A9A0DCAA", "Speak with Joey in the Void.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7ADD1DD648C57C2129696DA6502D59A3", "Joey says preparations here are complete. He keeps the white feather and gives you the black feather. Deliver it to Joey at Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E590FE9B4C6FE881FD86ED89E11204A4", "After receiving the black feather, Stella Party’s Joey says everything is ready and steps into the Void.")

Name: M_17_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E1E5329B43DC241340C7FA89E5C92737", "Speak with Joey in the Void.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C1C8479D47262E5022816FB1765C6EC8", "Joey finally stands before his true self.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "37061F484197BC765F5A048096DDB2FF", "The Observer — the true self, a self-luminous star — asks Joey what he truly wishes to become.")

Name: M_17_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "962D686847B810273E81DBBC6BEF22D8", "Speak with Void-Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "94F553D24F7919B84C543F808D32D6E7", "Speak with Void-Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0519CF414EF7BD7221F9FDAEC2CF244E", "Joey says he is tired of merely following the flow of a story. He wants to record the stories he chooses — to become a Recorder.")

Name: M_17_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "672FBDD445EEA9DE3DE90C860538A011", "Speak with Stella Party’s Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "16976D0645B982FD675DC2852D0FE0BA", "Speak with Stella Party’s Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6002C42F4A9EFC2FAD099B8FA42A257B", "The true self says he will not stop Joey if he wishes to become a Recorder. But if Joey disappears from his story, the Old Village and everyone within it will cease to exist. That world will collapse.")

Name: M_18_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0259E72E43B62C04911CE98598B3AC44", "Speak with Joey at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1C6DF10840DDD07D526036B5D2C2CDD6", "Continue speaking with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "65621CA5423FA6EDBD1AEFBF05173A83", "Stella Party’s Joey tells you that before becoming a Recorder, he must properly conclude his story.")

Name: M_18_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DA739E7149AF176A09372F8DA9917A7B", "Speak with Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "43875A6845C331DAF8ACC0AE2D6223DA", "Joey tries to write a new story but cannot yet grasp how. He decides instead to remake an old folktale and asks you to retrieve one from the library.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1798308546468AF2B4C643AE22C4C0C0", "You obtain The Sun and Moon Siblings.")

Name: M_18_2
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9C7C0A494919D3F3F4A62680AC6E4CE2", "Joey explains that to complete this story, several “ingredients” are needed.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F927E5274F99E211727E589C7FDB5F6B", "He says he needs the Tiger’s Essence and the Moon’s Essence. First, seek Blake in the Animal Forest for the tiger’s power.")

Name: M_18_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EC24534A47AFD0360EDEC5BB85E6282E", "Speak with Blake in the Animal Forest.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "306929EC4D54B21007E5BFABD47844D2", "Blake willingly agrees to share his strength.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A1F8E84A4C36B3EC007B30BD6D5F256D", "After muttering quietly to himself, Blake hands you a scroll imbued with his essence.")

Name: M_18_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3083AB924AF0A5B163F8F6908E4F5F9E", "Speak with Reina at Luna Lake.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3ED8B8394369AB9C0EF892BCEB6E0E44", "Reina says she can imbue her power, but you must bring her 10 Luna Flowers.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "74BFD4184BF29740F3E120BA73A27B06", "You receive the Moonlight Essence. Deliver it to Joey in the Void.")

Name: M_18_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9245F6024B9B7F16F576B0B3F62ABFE7", "Speak with Joey in the Void.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7D11837248112E8F7CE742B346C9074F", "Joey asks Do-sa Jun for help and passes him Blake’s essence.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D532AAB4449C0BFDBC617D900F6D92EF", "Jun quietly asks if Joey is leaving. There is a trace of farewell in his voice.")

Name: M_18_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EEF51F6E4019452046F65F962320523C", "Speak with Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6B38474D46360318608276B122C47412", "Joey seeks Nora’s help and gives her the Moon’s Essence.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5434F62E4B8547C981C8ACAE3E8B2F48", "Nora says, “We’ll meet again someday,” and agrees to help rewrite the story.")

Name: M_18_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "46D2DB7E42C5C0C3C582F28840E5F83E", "Visit Iris in the Old Village.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "54414A7B45642A6CD963628A824D46D8", "Joey tells Iris he has found a way to cure her illness — but it requires a goodbye.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "45913B3A4088D50FC60661862D3AD2F8", "Joey says everything is ready and prepares to begin the story of The Sun and Moon Siblings.")

Name: M_18_8
QuestName: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6C55E050401D539A9DEC659BE7238262", "“If You Give Me a Rice Cake…”")
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "55E7BB91460A379AC660C9A4576F19CC", "Speak with Joey to begin the story.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DCF9832A4FC87EA5938E409A5C2DF2AC", "As Joey opens the book and the Storykeeper (the Player) begins reading, the air shifts and night falls. In the distance, a tiger’s roar echoes. Run through the darkness and escape the tiger.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A4619081482C98849E7AD188F450FDD3", "Fleeing from the tiger, you reach a dead end.")

Name: M_18_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "775D026D4F86097D940F8EADAC9B2E02", "Arrive at the cliff’s edge.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F13EFF0748B82BFAAEA8EBA37A0EC37F", "Cornered at the precipice, Joey calls out to the moon for help. The moon answers: one must be sacrificed so the other may live. Joey tells Iris to live well in the moonlight, then casts himself into the cliff’s luminous glow.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0BF663D04DB8C34252F103BDBF086686", "Iris ascends with the moonlight, reborn as the Goddess of Moonlight. The spell placed upon Jun is lifted, and he returns to human form.")

Name: M_18_10
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6E0971834FA72CF38C8168AC0C5087FD", "Speak with Jun in the Old Village.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F9E7405147AA869C27F29BA6B937DFDA", "Speak with Jun once more.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0D25E5424A48717A567F96987AB53CC8", "When all is finished, neither Joey nor Iris can be seen in the village. Their story has closed — but it has not vanished.")

Name: M_19_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6049210140CAF8B032AB3482D4EEE131", "Enter the Void and speak with Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "492AEBF04B41D55C96AE06AC607190F8", "Speak with Void-Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5F941E9C4AD926B075591A8BB160EBE0", "Joey says Iris has awakened as a goddess, so no illness will ever trouble her again. He smiles faintly, saying he will one day return to ask about her well-being. Then, from behind him, slow applause echoes — his true self appears.")

Name: M_19_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "343CD1E4432E84D353134AA5417CF4E6", "Speak with Joey at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6FCB9F4041E381A0CC1FE68330A83D19", "Speak with Joey’s true self.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D16CD9284843B9DACE84549C40433BCD", "The true self says it was an impressive conclusion. With this, even if Joey departs, the story will remain stable. From within himself, he draws out Joey’s original story — now condensed into a star made of written words — and hands it to him.")

Name: M_19_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6E88BFA24F5291ADD4AC3DAB5B043157", "Speak with Joey at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E20906C04D718AE2675F92934D97C475", "Speak with Recorder Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D173391340E82C27145C7D8F68D0CFA2", "As Joey fully accepts his story, his eyes seem to gaze beyond another dimension. The true self congratulates him on attaining a new rank and encourages him to write well as a Recorder before quietly departing.")

Name: M_19_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D3A704754CBDE6685B31AEAF60F53EE1", "Speak with Recorder Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "876190C94EE5BA2E7589488E600EB919", "Continue the conversation.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AEC3C9FE4104F6C989EB4D91313538DA", "He looks at the Player and says,“Now I understand. I finally see why you are free from the story. You were never bound by it. You came from outside all of this.”")

Name: M_19_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F410C0D742F108A7CD72F2A5DE92D694", "Speak with Recorder Joey.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "402280BB4492F4E5A670F99103CF8560", "Continue speaking with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5D46E84E4C18FBDE3B071F9AF2C36DC5", "He says he now knows there are worlds beyond this one, and he wishes to record stories that exist beyond even the Void. He promises that if he learns anything about your grandfather, he will return to tell you. Then, without hesitation, he steps beyond the Void — and disappears.")

Name: M_20_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C658AA75405789882ABA8E99A174C3DA", "A message with no sender appears on your phone, containing only one short sentence: “Meet me in the Void.”")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "58598D154AE58F26680D2798E615A579", "It seems to have been sent by Joey, so you decide to head to the Void and confirm the truth yourself.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A6BB4BC44CF996B79B955CB685DDB748", "You find Joey waiting in the Void, and he immediately begins speaking about Chronos.")

Name: M_20_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E9FFBBC646C599937F2733B0864EC071", "Joey tells you that this place is no longer just the Void, but something deeper and fractured.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E94CCFC2437C0A455E7625948F71C87B", "You follow him into a silent rift within the Void where reality feels unstable.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "584723D549A8C9344DE5B8B5204CED3B", "Inside the gap, you discover distortions that look like traces of time slipping out of alignment.")

Name: M_20_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "27AE6D4F416D122E5D3EC4B66026A2DE", "Joey explains that he never directly met Chronos.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4DC5F896446D8F761BCDC093BE0636D6", "ou ask him what he actually encountered beyond the Void.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "01D8D991443277F4106855A2807C9401", "Joey says he found a way to trace Chronos not by meeting him, but by following the marks he left behind.")

Name: M_20_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "192A4576426A3C60C07957AB14DC2BC9", "Somewhere in the Void, remnants of Chronos’ presence remain.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "883C425245E545679CD9FBA8F17B654D", "You investigate the faint traces scattered across the fractured space.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "954620094A3B5961C2D354B091B9A4E2", "You uncover fragmented records suggesting Chronos is not merely a character, but a being who designed worlds.")

Name: M_20_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6C7C4F1A422FF93D332D07A602361121", "Joey believes the compass aboard the Chronos will react.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7B9ED5CA41090BB59CD55BA88DE92DDE", "Investigate the compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AFA5F638466AE7E59DBAEBBE450C75E4", "The compass vibrates subtly, not pointing to coordinates but to something far beyond navigation.")

Name: M_20_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "98FC691F48FADE67F0A7318EB586FC5C", "The mirror fragments resonate with the compass.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "20A68B64446541E214D6CEA974B4A15B", "Collect the scattered mirror shards within the Void.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6A35051248A39557B0ED31BB7B8265BF", "The shards align, forming a single reflection.What appears is not a timeline…but the gaze of an observer.")

Name: M_20_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "07A0DF924301E2437262A398F82E9083", "Joey reveals a fragment of memory lingering in his palm.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "405B64D04D36778864EE29AB971384B8", "You examine the memory and attempt to understand its origin.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6CFB10DE4291EF85776D91A964A76421", "The memory is revealed to be artificially constructed, and within it appears a single name — Chronos.")

Name: M_20_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6E04684449DDBBF6BE8FB19A0E6E6902", "Joey insists that the final answers lie aboard the Chronos ship.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "860637F940E05A52EBE52BB9046B3543", "You return to the ship to investigate the anomaly further.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7481936E4A42272759EE42BA892BE7E5", "Captain Cassandra senses something wrong with the compass, as if it has changed its purpose.")

Name: M_20_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2F285EE44A2FE573644EC5AEE60ED779", "Cassandra explains that the compass is no longer searching for location data.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A4A97B4C46EAA4C8B940DC95506BEE21", "You speak with her and analyze the direction it indicates.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D181DCCC40FB139B38E677B63D982BDF", "The compass is not pointing toward the edge of the world, but beyond it — outside the world entirely.")

Name: M_20_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C687D5054914E2873F41229F6828141C", "There is a concealed chamber somewhere inside the Chronos ship.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C71699DC41128B39D549A29EC559805F", "You locate and investigate the hidden space within the vessel.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "77988126477464E3675F0A938783F373", "Inside, you discover ancient design records revealing that the story was never accidental, but intentionally constructed from the very beginning.")

Name: M_21_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "594CB311461554FCE771198FBB67B1F6", "Cassandra says the internal structure of the compass is changing.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FD9AE4DE4E1B3899245ECB8B8675A337", "Examine the compass closely together with Cassandra.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "095C4B1646AF6BE4F25A608FBB8E3B27", "You discover an inscription engraved at its core: “Coordinates hold meaning only when an observer exists.”")

Name: M_21_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "556E0622420078A49C1840B818F30807", "The mirror fragments are resonating intensely with the compass.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F36901444B2D876847ACD083DE037B82", "Activate the source of the resonance.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "824E1CD14915113A5F6C87929BE39E85", "Light spreads outward, revealing a portion of Chronos’ navigation records.")

Name: M_21_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D1ABD312467374E10F1BE7AE97BCD941", "The resonance reveals an ancient voyage log.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "532B85BA424501F10BA91C85025631F6", "Analyze the recovered log.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "88E20DF043943C31D7BB3587CC8B4665", "Within the record, a single line stands out: “This world was designed.”")

Name: M_21_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "48E955FB4767EE1E9F2F379649A0392B", "Joey says something about the beginning of this world feels unnatural.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "953549FE4C2B2C6EAEEA26A354520962", "Speak with Joey about the world’s origin.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CCB34D994D54425A96BCDCA781DC5AA2", "Joey asks quietly, “Do you remember the day we first began to move?”")

Name: M_21_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B405B2E743D3587F7F8F0994D912D54B", "The compass begins pointing somewhere outside the known timeline.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "83BB6A9849DF9DE9653A1B9BE8F1DCE7", "Trace the direction indicated by the compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7778ED5A4C5AD2D5C7C6F68018E96CCD", "The direction does not lead to another era, but toward something beyond the world — the seat of observation.")

Name: M_21_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2A007FE94F945C1236937CB878D6768E", "Perhaps the answer lies beyond the story, at Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AD9A358E44BFD320EBB39ABB470D5492", "Travel to Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "38E1BDC24D32C412038653BB92D358AB", "Sean and Dan are already waiting for you.")

Name: M_21_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "03F3BAD9448C078FF1869FB15932933E", "Sean seems unusually quiet compared to his usual demeanor.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "00CE84DA46A95784C0AC9D92F4CD02FF", "Speak with Sean.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F25A3E3E4E47EB0C3D291DBDC68C8ADC", "Sean answers briefly, “Every window is opened for someone.”")

Name: M_21_7
QuestName: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "034234714DBAF5A50095EB8C4B2E4E42", "Sean answers briefly, “Every window is opened for someone.”")
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C7FFEEC5433C14211E865B8AB606335C", "A new archive section has appeared deep within the library.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7C05436F4C9ABFA114FF27B7090B9D2F", "Investigate the newly discovered archive.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AA524547499261B46A8847B1BC86B34B", "Inside, you find records of the Player’s choices carefully preserved.")

Name: M_21_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B04BBD2744C2F9B15B8409AFABC5BA97", "Some of the recorded sentences should not exist within this world.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9E363177486B95CB818A8E81C317A4ED", "Examine the anomalous text.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E244C46147C63D17B012C1A30F73963E", "One line reads clearly: “When the player leaves, the world stops.”")

Name: M_21_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B719A44D4116F6CB8BB87988034BBD55", "The Name Beneath Time")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "600884B9479239F2E7FFB88C8BCD1E14", "Attempt to restore the missing name.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "83A5B251499639166740CA92A809397C", "Beneath the faded ink, a single name emerges — “Chronos.”")

Name: M_22_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "97424B13486264CAB7B8A9B1551BA6EF", "Deep within the library shelves, ancient records are discovered, and among untouched books there are strange empty gaps.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DBFB11A941B88B7C98BA5BA1E3CCA96A", "Investigate the blank spaces between the records.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B5F72A814820301F3A52999B3395F432", "Within the emptiness, you find erased sentences, and one line remains faintly visible: “This memory was inserted.”")

Name: M_22_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8F9F1F8843AA9E885E70CA8FC82DC2B4", "The records of your past show signs of having been altered.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3DCEDF204B11737B98E13D91B9605437", "Reconstruct the memory scene and examine it closely.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4B13ACA644CEE7E50EB480B0B70115F0", "Portions of your childhood memory cut off unnaturally, as if someone appended them later.")

Name: M_22_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ED8153634A73B4C18ECE36B6C865C883", "Sean does not immediately answer your questions.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "069F0F864C10788B9FE677BD7852E6A3", "Speak with Sean.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FC6BAFF94B647C86D054D6B9B47F111A", "Sean quietly says, “Not every memory is voluntary.”")

Name: M_22_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3B2F8881438D2B8C8B2511A058F26090", "Dan has concealed a fragment of record.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0C91862140B0048B0C9239A6A9FE2851", "Speak with Dan and examine the fragment.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "39FCCB5C47DB2A3AC7C3F483D861B5AB", "The fragment references the name of the Designer.")

Name: M_22_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C319A14C451754B64FD1C8AF0C7AE67E", "Investigate the records concerning the ‘grandfather’ you remember.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "12B84B584CA410C15119B88401B05551", "Re-examine the memory from the past.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "406F202341FB6EA6D487828653F6D446", "The memory contains no emotional residue, existing more like a preset parameter than a lived experience.")

Name: M_22_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "29153EC843B984EBF2E9928DE6C3ED59", "Within the records, you discover sentences written in identical handwriting.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F6AB1C7040F4D8C2CB92A293F5E08C4E", "Trace the origin of the writing.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CCB3835F40AC07D63AE19496082BAD85", "The sentence concludes with the words: “The observer is part of the design.”")

Name: M_22_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3A8F59C34E3B4064F65C05A24A7A9F65", "The mirror fragments begin to react once again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3829E4A44D60F974DA5A5F89649E8695", "Look into the mirror carefully.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "05EF5A6C404B6FB08B84F0ACA903468D", "Reflected within is not merely a character, but the presence of the Player.")

Name: M_22_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2C1A24B246288E2A4816009FA21ECE81", "During the memory reconstruction, the timeline begins to destabilize.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D277A3A84D3D794928316CB83C3D3CCA", "Investigate the center of the fracture.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E8409D684CE58C841B1E51A02401DCF7", "It becomes clear that time itself began to flow from the moment you intervened.")

Name: M_22_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "685EFB9D4FA9E6532BCE48BE35C2676C", "Deep within the library, you discover a blueprint.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "87DDE0674C778B2B45A645973749835D", "Analyze the design carefully.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "666E25A5439D5F1C284C25A38007E46E", "The blueprint includes a designated entry labeled “Player.”")

Name: M_22_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "768CDB094FADBCEDF77FD99F1D45D136", "Joey quietly asks you something.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3486B0BD4374C2A3DF803589E2951D2D", "Speak with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "74A5029D408D40B67644A183EE7032B2", "Joey’s question is simple yet heavy: “Do we exist… because you are reading us?”")

Name: M_23_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "59C332A444D4A73BB1950A916B95642C", "You must return to where everything began, as the winter world of M1 is being called once again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FF3A3C6D47CD2500B7D82FBB2D19CA48", "Travel to the Winter Camp.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BCFB85384945A22A4DE1BE8FB1226C3B", "Winter still exists, but something feels slightly misaligned.")

Name: M_23_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DA02C95144E49F49805F39B79E095A8D", "A warmth that does not belong lingers within the winter world.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "34D28AD34F8C02FF97E27DB1325A4794", "Investigate the unusual traces of climate disturbance.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7A2874794364411EAF19ED87CFBEF0CB", "A faint residue of summer remains.")

Name: M_23_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1F203D0643F8B0AE8E2A37A2CA3667C4", "The Ice Spirit emits an unstable aura.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F682914C417D18696A35C9A925D1348B", "Speak with the Ice Spirit.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4662D36C487818B69EB7E7979F6E2766", "The spirit says, “He shook the seasons… and you restored them.”")

Name: M_23_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1590E22F44470784903997ADE731AB34", "Traces remain from the moment the world was turned into summer.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FF95A62B4780DC9CD452C99A6453DCCF", "Locate the center of the fracture.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "258E1FED442BB3FA6B15EF9868D27EC8", "At its core lingers the Void power once used by Joey.")

Name: M_23_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BF3A0EFF4CA551AD31428A836AA935C8", "The soul forms of Stella Party observed these changes from above.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8B3AF33C464AD116CD7C0FB265EF0801", "Travel to Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "60D3F6AA4B1F09B8B39D959A9A9FC2A9", "They say, “Time began to flow the moment you intervened.”")

Name: M_23_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7A4CC5074993615E6BC339BB739B2CF6", "Sean and Dan present the recorded logs.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "304590B44186F4EA2C5A04A1C42CC150", "Examine the records carefully.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1C31FACC42570DB25D226E9D2DCFD023", "You discover that after the Player’s first choice, the world’s state values began to fluctuate.")

Name: M_23_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ABF7B38D4C9289B8B3ED43968625676D", "The timeline trembles in instability.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "736C007A49C4B734D1D505AA1D7098CC", "Restore balance to the fractured time flow.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "593600D04588027CE21F3888AE956C13", "The world stabilizes once more, and time continues to move forward.")

Name: M_23_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0C1383604582AA0806697BA3A86A7152", "The compass begins reacting intensely.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8986BE2C448A3203BDDD8298756E0D99", "Activate the compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FDA3ACD448A37C141F0622ADDD49E5E7", "The compass no longer points to a temporal coordinate, but toward the point of observation.")

Name: M_23_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2FBAA6464801F2B65EF8A0ABA5796B31", "Reviewing the records reveals that all disturbances trace back to a single moment.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "26024C854627D67B6CE2A6B7AEB050D9", "Identify that moment.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4196EA224E34C6495C94368E48F24EE7", "That day was the day the Player first entered this world.")

Name: M_23_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "550441E3416B4AACA0E107A908DA3914", "All records converge toward a single name.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "777FBA70478A2F2F9E488A95F02510F7", "Reflect upon that name.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AEED29E545739741F66A0A87550426EA", "Chronos — not the one who created time, but the one who caused it to flow.")

Name: M_24_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B2B5E3FD4780EA08C01BA1AAEBDF9049", "The mirror shard discovered in the Void begins reacting once again.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "16D09FC34264B8B3C5925BB80D5AD7EE", "Stand before the mirror.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7564D2F04DB06E834749E4A618753DA7", "Reflected within is not a character, but the gaze of the Player.")

Name: M_24_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6862B15F4D789C57F1FD2AA3FFEDC842", "The surface of the mirror twists and the image begins to shake.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8CE55B5F47C9CC11E31B2EA981A6996C", "Examine the distorted reflection.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F1AA2AB446EBCA5EC2ABE4B93C2AA18B", "Instead of a scene from the world, a fragment of the game’s UI briefly flickers across the surface.")

Name: M_24_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4953E51343805CC84958FD89072A6EB4", "Joey finally voices a question he has long kept silent.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F0628FB947CD67AB124DC5B182D231C5", "Speak with Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C85E27B34DDD0D690B7C90A2ACBE1BAD", "Joey says quietly, “Maybe we move… because someone is watching.”")

Name: M_24_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A40796C242099620C52EA2882205C032", "The air inside the library feels strangely heavy.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2B32F39F4AA266582C338E8DDFC7E424", "Confirm the situation with Sean and Dan.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CA93754947F90160099CF38A903E1433", "Dan admits, “This world… is being read.”")

Name: M_24_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "843D359D4027405F439EF78FFCBB2036", "An unseen gaze can be felt from the upper level of the library.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "39A2CE9449D94B491B362B8900D30720", "Ascend to the upper floor.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9DAC8A29443B638E5BCABDBBA0F851D7", "No one is there, yet the records continue to update.")

Name: M_24_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "40B50C7344062850071704B801CFEF2F", "The pages of a book begin turning on their own.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "326C41F24DA87A46096920A208DAE865", "Examine the opened page.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "695AC83443705CB4AE182F8B504369F3", "Choices that were never selected are recorded, as if someone already knew them in advance.")

Name: M_24_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A385E61A4CFFBFA38FCA849E23BBA1B7", "The compass spins aimlessly, having lost its direction.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5C92623940CBF4D07B1347B0E0070264", "Attempt to stabilize the compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1C8BDE374B7BBEE6BE52AC9E01477704", "The compass no longer points within the world, but toward the seat of observation.")

Name: M_24_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DA2B531A46F22C4F11A584A61286BC4F", "Joey remains silent for a long moment.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D7BFA4DD4A6C79E83AF39B841C67097F", "Listen to what he is thinking.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "24BBABD84578FA1020884EA5775B33A7", "Joey says, “I was a character… but you… you are the reader.”")

Name: M_24_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DE1C3C7146906F99500717B372FD26A5", "A hidden design document is discovered deep within the library.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6FB360B04A6D8E5FE2FCA79715BA24B9", "Investigate the archived design files.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "20F23BDD46620505905EDDB052EF4AF3", "The document describes not only the structure of the world, but a design that assumes the intervention of an observer.")

Name: M_24_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8FBDABD24B2D3B1E8D5E1C837B51FD49", "Joey asks one final question.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EE701CBF4C593B284B635BABDB3116C5", "Speak with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5CE0A58F4E7C4BA65B3835B49E022DA5", "Joey’s voice trembles as he asks, “If you leave… will we stop?”")

Name: M_25_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1E0769D147A2E9AAA6C044949619EB0C", "A World Without Pain")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BEC2F26B401FC3D232886183FF27631D", "Observe the other world unfolding within the Void.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F2ACDC9E436A2D61269C09820C8D325C", "In that world, no one is hurt, and no one feels sorrow.")

Name: M_25_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9CAB231D402EA26E6D9C58A0B0475AFA", "Everything appears perfect.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B290318242043B3FADE0ED9367773DCA", "Observe the inhabitants of this world.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "556A19E14452B4A9DB141BA56316F627", "They are smiling… but they are not moving.")

Name: M_25_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E8E0A5D0439099A6A145C08C00660F00", "Time does not flow here.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "54723E43437139AD98B2B48CC62BFD9A", "Examine the environment for signs of change.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "76155BCF49AE56856134F39D6C293560", "There is no wind, no seasons, no choices — it is perfect, yet suffocating.")

Name: M_25_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "69CC4BFC475B3BA888C526B60F44A48F", "This world is sustained in a state of complete suspension.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B6FB6CBA437752808D30C7B2D74AF49B", "Investigate the source that maintains this stillness.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "68980451401C0A1C203906A2C8B1912B", "The source is the absence of observation — because no one is watching, nothing happens.")

Name: M_25_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FFF548CC45AEECA79EBD4DAEADA2F4A3", "Memories exist here, but nothing evolves.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "14468DF14FC12D9D3C3888A8287BFAC2", "Check the recorded history of this world.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "42CA71F94D3BCC6CCA93CCA95BDD782F", "Not a single new line has been written.")

Name: M_25_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1878B0B745244881A119169204EF316C", "Joey gestures toward this world and asks you something.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6DB4C9834AB0D54033AB15955C00D7C4", "Speak with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4A39628343AA9447168D1A932B619AC6", "Joey says quietly, “If there is no pain… there is no growth either.”")

Name: M_25_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7C5D7386497F7B9774DF768E525CEE0D", "Joey falls silent for a moment.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "296759624BCC67A1958C75ADF6C7F35A", "Listen to what he is thinking.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8C5966C04C5BDD977EBBA2BC16F64DBE", "Listen to what he is thinking.")

Name: M_25_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DCF5D5584719F48FBFE076B2E8F8A494", "A small fracture appears within the utopia.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3B9BA6DC4B8BCF09FF72C099BC94395D", "Investigate the crack.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D212546140D628E9EB5F8DBBC99BD6D6", "Flowing through the fracture is something unexpected — time.")

Name: M_25_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "07D4EA4E4874D60F905040BA1902ACA4", "You discover the design documents for this world.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8EF3C82341E54A43EFA219A439026F34", "Analyze the blueprint.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7AF8D7D24F81068875F00B9AFF0FD554", "The design reads: “No observer / No choices / No change.”")

Name: M_25_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "20FE61134E9B179FFB501F8EADBD6423", "Joey asks one final question.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3FDD7E5A486F78070B973E972A51AE73", "Listen carefully to him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "454976A8417607A9D8278294F73F56DD", "Joey’s voice is steady but heavy: “A world without sorrow… without joy. Would you still choose it?”")

Name: M_26_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2806EB5B4D35001AF21744BF35527E22", "Deep within the library, another trace of the original design is discovered.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E03700CA4EAEA337F331DA8079E0AB29", "Investigate the design remnants.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3BBABB7944B1A5CF530BB7A86A15C64A", "Within the records, one word repeats again and again: “Observer.”")

Name: M_26_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E32090CB4F6A0641B696AF820A897ECF", "Sean and Dan say they will no longer conceal the truth.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "41A6E6ED49835C07721690907ECF76DC", "Speak with the two librarians.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A43E518A4FF05327EAAD388752DFEF46", "They confess quietly, “We only managed the structure.”")

Name: M_26_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "72A78F61467CB7A9AB2264913F022C8D", "Joey seems to have connected the final pieces.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CD0597644E283DEB742D4A8128945268", "Speak with Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "059710D04E4F3E8F945B93A0C64C6A2D", "Joey says, “We came alive the moment you began reading.”")

Name: M_26_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6FFAE6D04F1AB68B4C8544BA12AE5014", "The compass no longer trembles.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3070624E4EAAEACBED712082FF4B6335", "Examine the stabilized compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E2C499F64AFE5B343DDF3986B07664B0", "It points in only one direction — beyond the story.")

Name: M_26_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0F70AAA8492C0E8FD6054DA77489B0E2", "All the mirror shards are ready to be restored.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0E4D995345B4E20AC377AEA95FC750D7", "Reassemble the mirror.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "34514B4A4DABA51347C8718915FA20CE", "The mirror reflects not the world, but the game screen itself.")

Name: M_26_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9E8950934A0AD9425AA378AB1B56763C", "The image within the mirror stabilizes.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D6DD71DE4766AAA917A936ACA0E52DC7", "Gaze into the mirror.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2C4283AB407E636BA2E41E9FB74BB1E3", "Joey says quietly, “You are not a character. You are the reader.”")

Name: M_26_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B8B00A334FDCF18645876193695BF951", "Joey remains silent for a long time.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "46C864BF472C18E618D4B4AF3ADFABB0", "Listen to his decision.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E8381D4B46FB8429A96E61A4A6922B86", "“I will become a Recorder,” he declares. “Not within the story — but beyond it.”")

Name: M_26_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7159E1214C068C6A19CD3FB84C72B753", "The pages of the library book turn on their own to the final chapter.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FCD1597B4F3E444F1A5FCCAB6B3CBF4E", "Examine the opened page.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0CCA10D141B423363C14D485676C475A", "A blank page appears — an ending not yet written.")

Name: M_26_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "75409D074F48E2A9F64456A898E26390", "Joey looks at the final page in silence.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DE9F380C4154CD4DEC135D86F51BCB2E", "Speak with him.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "52BAB5394649192A7036EABCCE4527EE", "Joey says, “You don’t have to decide the ending. Reading it is enough.”")

Name: M_26_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C24ED9334B7CDDCA27E5309CEF22B535", "Everything grows quiet.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6E037C17404B615995513A8C81A0D19A", "Prepare for the final choice.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3A84670E41B6E832222F9D8682C38E9C", "The book cover begins to close slowly — but it does not lock.")

Name: M_27_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A1EF2B57453BCD3CD4B899ADDBBB0433", "Just before everything ends, Joey speaks to you one last time.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6436CBE046E77F170ADA00AA91C8EE89", "Have the final conversation with Joey.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DA09E2FA4CCB5A242B195084C62E1DDF", "“A story can end,” he says softly, “but memories remain.”")

Name: M_27_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D814E25746192770D48A76832459F31D", "For a final farewell, you head to Stella Party.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2F7BB66F4E7D6FEFECAD4988B8DB3A21", "Arrive at Stella Party.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9F626BEA4E6B7BAEF2FE9180A7811958", "The soul forms glow quietly in the starlight.")

Name: M_27_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "988070DD43FDFDECED1F0AACA5A92FA3", "Beneath the stars, Joey slowly lifts his head.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CF46202449664C6D7D9188828F132090", "Listen to his words.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ED41373C47848F5D63A85EB1B08584D6", "“We only shined because you were there.”")

Name: M_27_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F6E7D7104A90669A51FB18A1245AD9F4", "The star shards begin to gather as one.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6C3D4EE849759EDC7F2EF3A4B1F6C35A", "Combine all the shards.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "4559D17143612CF1BB31E28533018596", "A completed storybook takes physical form.")

Name: M_27_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "65EBC1C648BE2091C14A3EB2203D60E5", "Joey accepts the seat of the Recorder.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C3EFFB3A472F26031A0772B768096FDD", "Hand over the star shards.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "76C86B8B450ADB52E345D6BAE69B67DF", "Light seeps into Joey, merging with him.")

Name: M_27_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C8918C094CC02994C7DD239918073782", "A title begins engraving itself upon the cover.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9F6C87BA498E644AD5B052B7BAE68374", "Examine the completed book.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1DA7335D43447EB2C1E4A1BB15E836CF", "《Shards of the Library — End of Season 3》")

Name: M_27_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5EAFBD954241CF08CED22FB02129B496", "Black ink scatters through the air.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "FFB657C3417C54A280B7568C656D1A07", "Watch the drifting ink.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "AB97990F402BC1FEFD876C9A1880B47A", "The ink briefly forms words before fading away.")

Name: M_27_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DF9410B4422B3F9B3756FB9583253BB0", "The compass trembles one final time.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DBAAEC564A5EDF93ED960191F2D97F76", "Check the compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B17242D0402E93E803CAA694135B6976", "The needle comes to rest.")

Name: M_27_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C21260AF41189485720F8AAD88D7B025", "The book slowly begins to close.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7BC7EBD34024464C688997B80F80349C", "Watch the closing pages.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "194B6B6C4DD619D0983B319CC88B7DDA", "The book shuts completely — but it does not lock.")

Name: M_27_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C54C3DB74B57C8377BF39E803B722E33", "In the darkness, Joey’s voice echoes faintly.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "58644A6F44C207CEFA61538A21B1E157", "Listen to what he says.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D65BEA2E4CCEE54598893EAAC6FA02FE", "“Whenever you wish to read again… the story will always open for you.”")

Name: M_28_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "96473FA24BAD7231F12D1AAA00776957", "Recorder Joey quietly looks at you.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DE8F70A7466E48F322577C85A31E0D54", "Listen carefully to the question he asks.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0CCD51044A1CA9D55C796080F4C12D14", "“Why are you still reading this story until the very end?”")

Name: M_28_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "069ADC0B4CD9BA06C2A82E870DD2FC0D", "Joey is no longer a character within the story.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "618DFFE444A812D798C207AE4B8955C3", "Watch as he walks toward the Void.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5C2E509F4359EC5A9E8E7BAA293862A1", "“He did not disappear — he simply stepped back.”")

Name: M_28_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "78E349B8406BADE504F38AA1180D72DC", "He almost says something, then stops.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "2E4F9C24498FA30CDB68CC9FE19B735B", "A quiet silence fills the space.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C73EE7A04E701D63E5CA53A64C63000E", "His final words are never recorded.")

Name: M_28_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6ED04D564AC2E54A7368B79A2EBB3B85", "The starlight of Stella Party begins to waver.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E303DB83496D49E2DD56CEABA2E676E6", "Watch the stars fade one by one.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0236950B403AD6238BCCDBBBEEA68701", "“The stars did not go out — observation ceased.”")

Name: M_28_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9BCCC1BC47279B01930D13A34207287F", "A small fragment of light remains behind.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F93F006B4E670B928E3C83BCCAB07B12", "Observe what becomes of it.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "446AC3F34626DBBC011D10B9B5787BE2", "“It is a trace of the Recorder… but now, it belongs to you.”")

Name: M_28_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0B39D06C496AF38CF1B8059CD345D720", "Joey no longer stands close by.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A1A40CC14930AE2C217E5FA390505E0E", "Sense his distant presence.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "079FE612424354DF69B3A99E1E5C3757", "“He observes… but no longer intervenes.”")

Name: M_28_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "159A536B4DED3A2E4C75B09117CD09E6", "The library records begin to reorganize themselves.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CDB0FAC4462FD533CFA030B3423AD167", "Check Joey’s entry in the archive.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7590F63A4009BED7DECC9EA04E069112", "“‘Character: Joey’ has vanished… but ‘Recorder’ remains.”")

Name: M_28_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1932FFF64B8F868D168469ACE2FF4B4C", "The world continues to move forward.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "511D57BB4D8033D03B5462A4361A8A8D", "Look around you.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DBECEB584094F2F843FB69BC1136CFE4", "“The story did not end — only one volume was closed.”")

Name: M_29_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "975854474B74421D17281B882FCA5FD3", "After everything has ended, you return to the Joyville Library.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "97F366E242F2F91EDDFDA0847E06E86A", "Enter the library.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9BDCE4F6401ACDD8A754D0B5B1789510", "The library appears unchanged.")

Name: M_29_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5C2C7ABE49E84CE5EEBBB69509A9A314", "The hall feels unnaturally silent.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "961266C54819C7C18F4D14B86171FA1C", "Look around the central hall.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "40703B994C54C677F7B5FC88D598D142", "“Only your footsteps echo. No one speaks.”")

Name: M_29_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "572B73EA458850F88C2DF298942C376B", "Sean stands behind the counter.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "F715E47F466A5C1207C0DB9E005545A4", "Speak with Sean.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "ECBC43D94752F0A408F934ACDF943E54", "He nods quietly. “Did you enjoy reading the story?”")

Name: M_29_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "486D36794F9641BF4E5031B2DA7F2CC7", "Dan closes a book in silence.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EBDB6EA445ED35C0EFC8CC8BD3410549", "Speak with Dan.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EFB3509D4077D06334D480AA17C2064B", "“The record is complete,” he says, “but interpretation belongs to you.”")

Name: M_29_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B046B001432D0E5AB7DC31A20874B51D", "A mirror stands along one wall of the library.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "805E9BA04EC084B1331E0F856D0C9BA1", "Look into the mirror.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "CBA8605C43314ADBE5D7929B5CD1D461", "“This time, it reflects nothing unusual — only a still, silent image.”")

Name: M_29_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B79334C84EF54FBB5E7B6D8559424126", "Cassandra’s compass lies quietly on a desk.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "B8E26AE3467B1E15A47D2D8A3E07E159", "Examine the compass.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "A42851F145CB7E75195FFAB658B1EF2E", "“The needle no longer moves. The coordinates no longer tremble.”")

Name: M_29_6
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "78AD0DF1470747B1C08A4085411997B3", "A faint light lingers between the bookshelves.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3F0EA9924B76000BBEE8A0A1469E88BC", "Investigate the lingering trace.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "861A70DF483955D10EE8308E99843AFD", "“The Recorder has left… but the trace remains.”")

Name: M_29_7
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7C60F8BD4D7B57DECF191E9E8BF3771E", "Small letters appear along the page’s margin.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "BEB414814F99EEFB11D5B187519D147D", "Read the marginal note carefully.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "0A4D3C774CF353D4897F51829D97226B", "“Even when the record ends, the moment you read it — it begins again.”")

Name: M_29_8
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "171AE04744FEF34D15E41F894B2AB4D4", "A small sentence rests beneath the final page.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "289BBC144BD1169A01B62BA76DA13130", "Read the sentence.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "C7F38844435F183061A947BA6E8D51A5", "“Sometimes… remember this story.”")

Name: M_29_9
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7B288B9D439C59ADF1B31A8EF49ECBB9", "The UI quietly restores itself.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "5BB170B14D066497C880D2A37C0191C2", "Check the menu screen.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "70CACDEA417EFF8D039EBDAAE6DD3E73", "“The game continues. The story has closed — but it is not locked.”")

Name: M_29_EX_0
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "E72A0D3F428D4CB055711DA9711FC744", "The main menu briefly flickers, revealing an option that should not exist.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D237CAD94B7A29ADE713BD9DD1D3D64B", "Reopen the menu and check the anomalous entry.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D528A93843D90D66032BE4BB9AA98F5C", "A hidden tab appears for a moment — [System Residue Detected].")

Name: M_29_EX_1
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "9C790DF245A9C7C51E28FC9D328F80DE", "Small UI glitches begin appearing throughout the interface.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "8FFA6A5440CDB85C0B3398A526B2C2C2", "Collect system fragments from the map, inventory, and quest windows.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "D1C26868404B257FC1B8EE93C8A83278", "The fragments assemble into a single set of coordinates.")

Name: M_29_EX_2
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "71F482714C2F3E74904411A909510D9A", "A hidden location becomes accessible.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7227D0464647E3CA397453966E51DD66", "Enter the Interface Room.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3E402D16482BB5F397147DA4BF869BAA", "“There are no NPCs, no background — only floating UI windows.”")

Name: M_29_EX_3
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6561B1FC4458F3C8A490A9B119F6B157", "A warning message appears — Manual Override Available.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3DAA572243B2796CE30FE38BAFC48B5C", "Temporarily suspend the system.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "DC6702524FFE16971445FFBD15B4C0E7", "“All sound vanishes. The world freezes.”")

Name: M_29_EX_4
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "3B50B7904A36328E4325E595DC550B92", "Only one window remains active.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "6DFFA192484EC1DD5C3312B0C351C26F", "Open the final window.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "1B94122F4A2988DFD2BB1AA8B780F52F", "“A single line appears — ‘Do you wish to continue observing?’”")

Name: M_29_EX_5
BeforeDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "EBF984A84A83F8000E8C27BF7BB5BCEA", "The cursor moves slowly across the screen.")
ProgressDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "7E2A5DBC4668A9F6CADFCCA49E30BD31", "Select the ‘Close’ button.")
CompleteDetail: NSLOCTEXT("[BF666F4AC71A560A9578684015AB52F4]", "800313A64F12328D53AC83ABF87408E6", "“The screen fades to black. After three seconds, the title screen returns.”")
